headline: AI recap for April 23, 2026
strapline: 95 articles across 12 sources in the latest sweep.
overview: This recap was built from 95 collected AI stories. The summaries below use a deterministic fallback because a Claude response was unavailable.

highlights.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
highlights.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

highlights.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
highlights.summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

highlights.title: Gemma 4 VLA Demo on Jetson Orin Nano Super
highlights.summary: Tracked from Hugging Face in tier B.

highlights.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
highlights.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

highlights.title: From Rainforests to Recycling Plants: 5 Ways NVIDIA AI Is Protecting the Planet
highlights.summary: Across climate, conservation, disaster monitoring and recycling, NVIDIA AI is enabling applications protecting the planet.
